item.title: 60 Ton Over the Edge
item.description: A massive 60‑ton load goes over the edge. How do you recover something this heavy without making it worse?

media:content.media:title: 60 Ton Over the Edge
media:content.media:description: A massive 60‑ton load goes over the edge. How do you recover something this heavy without making it worse?

item.title: How We Tie Things Up
item.description: Securing the load is half the battle. What’s the process behind tying things up the right way?

media:content.media:title: How We Tie Things Up
media:content.media:description: Securing the load is half the battle. What’s the process behind tying things up the right way?

item.title: Scale House Shutdown! Broken Trailer Recovery
item.description: A broken trailer brings everything to a halt. How do you get operations moving again when the scale house shuts down?

media:content.media:title: Scale House Shutdown! Broken Trailer Recovery
media:content.media:description: A broken trailer brings everything to a halt. How do you get operations moving again when the scale house shuts down?

item.title: RV Stuck in the Worst Spot!
item.description: An RV trapped in a nightmare location. How do you pull off a recovery when the odds are stacked against you?

media:content.media:title: RV Stuck in the Worst Spot!
media:content.media:description: An RV trapped in a nightmare location. How do you pull off a recovery when the odds are stacked against you?

item.title: Checking Everything Before We Head Out
item.description: Preparation is key before hitting the road. What checks make sure the job goes smoothly from the start?

media:content.media:title: Checking Everything Before We Head Out
media:content.media:description: Preparation is key before hitting the road. What checks make sure the job goes smoothly from the start?

item.title: Towing a Truck After Driver Ran Out of Service Hours
item.description: When a driver hits their legal limit on service hours, the truck can’t move any further. How does the towing crew step in to keep freight moving safely and by the book?

media:content.media:title: Towing a Truck After Driver Ran Out of Service Hours
media:content.media:description: When a driver hits their legal limit on service hours, the truck can’t move any further. How does the towing crew step in to keep freight moving safely and by the book?

item.title: “Yard Dog” Truck Stuck Under a Trailer
item.description: A yard dog truck gets wedged under a trailer. How do you free it without causing more damage?

media:content.media:title: “Yard Dog” Truck Stuck Under a Trailer
media:content.media:description: A yard dog truck gets wedged under a trailer. How do you free it without causing more damage?

item.title: We Also Unload
item.description: Recovery isn’t just about towing—it’s unloading too. What challenges come with handling heavy cargo?

media:content.media:title: We Also Unload
media:content.media:description: Recovery isn’t just about towing—it’s unloading too. What challenges come with handling heavy cargo?
